privileged_info_summary: The task uses Microsoft Word 2010, which is installed from an Office 2010 Professional Plus ISO (approximately 731 MiB) available on Internet Archive at https://archive.org/details/office2010nokeyneeded_201908. The environment ID is 'microsoft_word_starter_env@0.1' as confirmed in env.json. Documents are saved to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\WordTasks. The task uses synthetic test data (fictional names, addresses, and dates) and starts from a blank Word document. No existing data files or external datasets are used for this task.
